member.name: T:PqcIdentity.Identity.Infrastructure.Services.CsrService
member.summary: Service for parsing and validating Certificate Signing Requests (CSRs). Uses KAZ-SIGN-256 for signature verification.

member.name: T:PqcIdentity.Identity.Infrastructure.Services.Asn1Reader
member.summary: Simple ASN.1/DER reader for parsing CSRs.

member.name: T:PqcIdentity.Identity.Infrastructure.Services.RecoveryTokenService
member.summary: Service for managing recovery tokens using Shamir's secret sharing.

member.name: T:PqcIdentity.Identity.Infrastructure.Services.RecoveryTokenService.__LogDeactivatedTokensStruct
member.summary: This API supports the logging infrastructure and is not intended to be used directly from your code. It is subject to change in the future.

member.name: T:PqcIdentity.Identity.Infrastructure.Services.RecoveryTokenService.__LogRevokedTokensStruct
member.summary: This API supports the logging infrastructure and is not intended to be used directly from your code. It is subject to change in the future.

member.name: T:PqcIdentity.Identity.Infrastructure.Services.RegistrationCertificateService
member.summary: Implementation of IRegistrationCertificateService that integrates with the Certificate module for certificate issuance.
